response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified intro screen (00:00 - 02:22). 2. Identified dramatic speech by Anya Melfissa (02:22 - 02:57). 3. Identified musical performance (02:57 - 05:00) of the song 'UNDEAD'. 4. Used search tool to find the official lyrics of 'UNDEAD' by Ayase. 5. Compiled the scene data, metadata, and lyrics into the final JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video begins with an intro screen followed by a dramatic monologue delivered by the VTuber Anya Melfissa, leading into a 3D musical performance of the song 'UNDEAD' by Ayase.

scenes.description: Introductory screen with static images and text.
Dramatic monologue delivered by Anya Melfissa.
Musical performance of the song 'UNDEAD' by Ayase, performed by Anya Melfissa.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
UNHAPPY? Children of man full of worries
UNLUCKY? Those who are not yet men
BE HAPPY! Aim without an ounce of slack,
UNDEAD You're alive, you know!
Even for the past you averted your gaze from
And your future with nothing fun to do
counseling, what a bummer
Throughout all ages and places, peace peace!
Hey, why do I kinda get that feeling
that I'm fighting who-knows-what?
Can't touch, don't want to touch
My past self self self self
They've already died
I'm confronting see-through ghosts
from deep in painful memories of my own tender youth
Too bad? Even though they're already gone
Huh? Prefer that? Ironic, right?
Is your current self see-through?
Nonsense, can't get rid of the label
Yes! Basically it's a complex,
Like something’s got its hold on you
I'm still all wrapped up
in my past selves,
they won't let me go—
UNDEAD
They're, not, dead!
The chain linking you and you together!
To be alive is to continue to change
Don't go finding satisfaction
in resigning yourself to your discontentment
The fact that you refuse to even try to be happy, you coward!
This world, the present world we live in
is one devilishly odd fantasy
Who knows what we'll come across next, a devil or a snake?
Our story finally starts to happen after chance meetings and unfortunate encounters
So, will it be a human or monster?
Now, back to the topic that's at hand, peace peace!
Past & Future
can't change the Past
Past & Future
run for the Future
(Ka-ka!) Cu-cu-cut in!
Why does it feel like
there's no hope
to be had for the future
and nothing to expect
I've been living long enough.
Fed up with deja-vu and the same stuff as always
with no sign of anything wonderful coming up.
Too bad…
Karma from accumulating experiences
with myths reduced to shells of formality and stale evolution
The point, all I want is stimulation
I'm sick of it,
I'm used to it.
What a thing,
Guidance is put in order
My compliance increases
It's like it's all being capped with a lid
I suck it all up
That, this, all of it
Tastes the same
UNDEAD
They're not dead,
The chain linking you and you together!
In any era
The past, the future, they're all in the present.
Just be single-mindedly sincere
to the act of being alive,
Aim for a happy ending!
UNDEAD
You're, not, dead!
Yes, I'm talking to YOU!
Do NOT give up on happiness,
live as a human!
If you just get used to the suffering,
and endure all the pain
You're as good as dead,
a truly undead corpse!
UNHAPPY? Children of man full of worries
UNLUCKY? Those who are not yet men
BE HAPPY! Aim without an ounce of slack,
UNDEAD I mean, you're alive, you know!
Whether it's wallowing in unhappiness
or finding your own happiness
yes, everything, it's all on you
Throughout all ages and places,
to every single thing,
all things in existence,
peace peace!
Past & Future
can't change the Past
Past & Future
run for the Future
Wherever there are men, there's always something to worry about
Live out this story full of nothing but monsters.
